name: chat-realtime
summary: Supabase Realtime DMs + group chat for the web: member-scoped RLS, Server Actions to send/read, a client subscribe hook. Key-free.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_chat.sql (conversations/members/messages, member-scoped RLS, realtime publication)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
No keys — Supabase Realtime works on the free tier. RLS limits what each client receives.
Replace src/features/chat/ui/message-thread.tsx after the Claude Design pass
